# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for Lambda functions with permissions for S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: LambdaMultiServiceExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3FullAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: s3:*
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: DynamoDBFullAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: dynamodb:*
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: SQSFullAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sqs:*
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: SNSFullAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:*
                Resource: '*'
        - PolicyName: CloudWatchFullAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: 
                  - cloudwatch:*
                  - logs:*
                Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  LambdaExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda Execution Role
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: LambdaMultiServiceExecutionRoleArn
  LambdaExecutionRoleName:
    Description: Name of the Lambda Execution Role
    Value: !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
    Export:
      Name: LambdaMultiServiceExecutionRoleName
